name: edu-notification-blocker
description: Handle notification blocking when visiting school sites

scripts.get:dependencies: npm install && cd src/system-app && npm install && cd ../chrome-extension && npm install
scripts.extension:release: mkdir -p dist/chrome-extension/dist/ && npm run extension:build && cp src/chrome-extension/manifest.json dist/chrome-extension/manifest.json && cp -r src/chrome-extension/dist/ dist/chrome-extension/dist/
scripts.system-app:release: npm run system-app:build && cp -r src/system-app/dist/ dist/system-app/
scripts.build: npm run extension:release && npm run system-app:release

author: Matthew Allen Rackley <matthew.rackley17@gmail.com>
